results.text: Yegor Shilov - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. Eliteprospects.com hockey player profile of Yegor Shilov, 2008-04-30 Tyumen, RUS Russia. Most recently in the QMJHL with Victoriaville Tigres. Complete player biography and stats. Yegor Shilov – DobberProspects. October 2025 – Shilov is an incredibly skilled 200-ft center who approaches the game with almost a relaxed style, which is nearly unpredictable for defending players. He has 19 points through the first 10 games of the year and has shown night in and night out that he is an offensive threat.
